backlog.notes: Mesh/task IR operation nodes emit deterministic unsupported diagnostics with type-correct fallback values. Real SPIR-V mesh/task stage entry-point and payload lowering is not implemented yet.

Plain 2D textureGather lowers to CUDA tex2Dgather with component selection and explicit-sampler overloads; native tex2Dgather imports back to CrossGL textureGather. Array, cube, offset, shadow, multisample, and sparse-residency gather forms emit deterministic diagnostics.
Mojo source has no C-style preprocessor expansion in this frontend; # lines are treated as comments and native import/from-import declarations are parsed separately.

Storage-image readonly/writeonly access metadata is tracked for Slang RWTexture resources; invalid reads, writes, and image atomics emit deterministic diagnostics. Structured-buffer and byte-address-buffer access qualifiers are not audited yet.
Graphics examples lower to CUDA-shaped code, not native raster pipeline stages.
Graphics examples lower to HIP-shaped code, not native raster pipeline stages.
Vertex entry points lower to Mojo shader decorators and compile-oriented signatures, but Mojo has no complete raster pipeline/resource ABI in this repo.
Fragment entry points lower to Mojo shader decorators and compile-oriented signatures, but direct render-target ABI semantics are not complete.
Mojo codegen rejects geometry stages explicitly; the Mojo backend currently exposes only vertex, fragment, and compute compile-smoke stages.

Maps geometry blocks to Slang geometry entry points, lowers geometry system-value builtins, preserves semantic aliases, emits maxvertexcount attributes, and validates stage-attribute shapes. Full stream-output/emission semantics are still incomplete.
Mojo codegen rejects tessellation stages explicitly; the Mojo backend currently exposes only vertex, fragment, and compute compile-smoke stages.

Maps tessellation_control and tessellation_evaluation to Slang hull/domain stages, lowers tessellation system values, tessellation-factor semantics, gl_in/gl_out patch rewrites, patch-constant functions, and validates hull/domain patch shapes and attributes. Full cross-stage compiler-backed tessellation coverage remains incomplete.

Entry points lower to HLSL mesh/amplification shader attributes with deterministic stage names, numthreads from local-size layouts or @numthreads, and optional mesh output topology attributes. Full mesh payload/output signature validation remains incomplete.
Entry points and combined-stage names lower with GL_EXT_mesh_shader enablement and local-size layouts for task/mesh stages. Full mesh output layout and payload semantics are not complete.

Entry points lower to valid Metal object/mesh function attributes with deterministic names, max_total_threads_per_threadgroup from local-size layouts or explicit attributes, generated or explicit mesh output signatures/topology, SetMeshOutputCounts primitive counts, whole vertex/index/primitive output writes, single-member output member writes, multi-member partial output writes through accumulators, object/mesh payload parameters, DirectX-style @mesh_payload parameters, and DispatchMesh payload argument forwarding through object_data payloads. Literal output-count bounds, simple write-after-SetMeshOutputCounts ordering, if/switch branch dominance, and provable loop-exit dominance for post-branch/output writes are validated. Remaining gaps are symbolic loop iteration analysis and multi-payload pipeline shapes.
Mojo codegen rejects mesh/task/object stages and mesh IR intrinsics explicitly; the Mojo backend currently exposes only vertex, fragment, and compute compile-smoke stages.

Entry points lower to Slang mesh/amplification shader attributes with deterministic duplicate-entry names, local-size layouts or @numthreads attributes emit numthreads metadata, outputtopology emits quoted Slang attributes, and SetMeshOutputCounts/DispatchMesh lower to native Slang calls with arity and stage validation. Full mesh output signature/payload validation and slangc-backed mesh compilation remain incomplete.
Ray entry points lower to HLSL library shader attributes with stage-specific names and payload semantics, but full ray pipeline object/signature coverage remains incomplete.
Entry points and combined-stage names lower with GL_EXT_ray_tracing enablement, but full GLSL ray tracing layout and payload semantics are not complete.

Ray generation payloads lower to device references; acceleration structures and intersection_function_table resources lower to Metal raytracing buffer parameters; full TraceRay calls lower to ray plus intersector intersection queries with xcrun metal3 coverage for helper-threaded calls, instance masks, primitive_acceleration_structure shape, single compatible intersection_function_table dispatch, and thread-local payload forwarding. Unsupported TraceRay payload forms, such as missing compatible tables or non-thread payload parameters, emit compile-safe diagnostics. CallShader lowers to visible_function_table dispatch for explicit tables or a single global table; visible_function_table and intersection_function_table ray-generation parameters lower with compiler-validated buffer bindings; hit, miss, and callable stages lower to visible functions with ray_data payload/callable-data references; intersection stages lower to Metal intersection attributes for triangle and bounding-box functions. Arrayed Metal ray function table globals and parameters are emitted as compile-safe unsupported diagnostics because Metal rejects arrays of visible_function_table and intersection_function_table buffer parameters. Full Metal ray-pipeline binding and multi-table callable selection semantics remain incomplete.

Registers RayQuery types and acceleration-structure resources as SPIR-V KHR objects; lowers TraceRayInline, Proceed, CandidateRayT, CommittedRayT, abort/terminate, generated/procedural intersection commits, non-opaque/confirm intersection commits, ray state getters for RayTMin and RayFlags, world ray vector getters, candidate/committed object ray vector getters, object/world transform matrix getters, candidate AABB opacity, and intersection metadata getters for type, primitive index, instance ID, instance custom index, shader-binding-table record offset, geometry index, barycentrics, and triangle front-face to KHR ray-query instructions with validator-backed coverage. Full ray tracing stages, TraceRay, acceleration-structure arrays, and triangle vertex positions remain incomplete.
Mojo codegen rejects ray tracing stages, ray tracing intrinsics, and ray query methods explicitly; no Mojo ray pipeline ABI is implemented in this repo.

Ray entry points lower to Slang shader stage attributes with deterministic stage names, ray built-ins lower to Slang intrinsics, payload, hit attribute, and callable data stage interfaces lower to Slang parameter directions, native TraceRay, CallShader, ReportHit, IgnoreHit, and AcceptHitAndEndSearch calls are stage/shape/type validated, and RayQuery methods emit native Slang calls with receiver/argument validation and result type inference. Full ray pipeline object/resource binding and slangc-backed coverage remain incomplete.

Stage parameter semantics are preserved as Mojo field/parameter comments for compile-smoke output, with duplicate parameter semantics, output-only input misuse, builtin stage misuse, and builtin parameter type mismatches rejected deterministically. Target-native builtin ABI mapping remains incomplete.

Direct staged function return semantics are preserved as deterministic Mojo metadata comments, and builtin return semantics validate stage and type compatibility. Real target-native wrapper/ABI behavior remains incomplete.

Direct return semantics map to Slang system values, fragment color/depth returns can be rewritten through output structs, invalid void-return semantics are rejected, and stage/execution marker metadata is filtered so it does not become a return semantic. Full target ABI and slangc-backed return-semantics coverage remain incomplete.

Struct member semantics are preserved as Mojo field comments, builtin output semantic types are validated, and struct-return builtin semantics validate stage compatibility. Target-native shader I/O ABI lowering remains incomplete.

Global texture, sampler, image, structured-buffer/resource-array, and cbuffer declarations emit deterministic CrossGL resource metadata comments with explicit @set/@group/@binding and HLSL register-space preservation, automatic per-namespace binding assignment, and duplicate/range-overlap diagnostics. Mojo still uses compile-smoke placeholders rather than a native GPU resource ABI.

CrossGL cbuffers lower to registered Mojo value structs with scalar/vector/matrix/array member storage, deterministic resource metadata comments, and compile-smoke coverage for local values, function parameters, and returns. Target-native uniform binding ABI is not complete.

StructuredBuffer and RWStructuredBuffer globals lower to Vulkan-compatible SPIR-V BufferBlock descriptors with runtime-array storage, descriptor set/binding allocation, std430-style member/array layout decorations, buffer_load/buffer_store lowering, direct indexed member access, read-only store diagnostics, and spirv-as/spirv-val coverage. Append/consume and byte-address buffer operations are not implemented yet.

StructuredBuffer, RWStructuredBuffer, typed Buffer/RWBuffer aliases, rasterizer-ordered structured/typed/byte-address buffer aliases, append/consume buffers, and byte-address buffers lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder abstractions with load/store/dimensions helpers and deterministic invalid member/free-helper diagnostics; real GPU memory binding semantics remain incomplete.

Covers StructuredBuffer/RWStructuredBuffer declarations, AppendStructuredBuffer/ConsumeStructuredBuffer native method lowering, ByteAddressBuffer/RWByteAddressBuffer scalar and vector method lowering, fixed resource arrays, explicit and automatic Slang/Vulkan binding metadata, load/store/dimensions helper lowering, expression-form dimensions helpers, explicit-result and expression-valued structured-buffer atomics, loop-context diagnostics for value-preserving atomic hoists, access-kind diagnostics, and Slang vector alias mapping inside buffer element types. GLSL buffer-block round-trips are not implemented yet.

Fixed resource arrays lower to InlineArray placeholders for textures, images, and buffers, and indexed image/buffer access honors readonly/writeonly validation. Unsized/resource-binding semantics are not complete.

Covers fixed and expression-sized texture, sampler, shadow, image, StructuredBuffer, Append/ConsumeStructuredBuffer, and ByteAddressBuffer arrays, nested resource arrays, dynamic resource-array parameters, indexed access through control flow and loops, automatic binding range allocation, and overlap diagnostics. Unsized/bindless resource-array semantics and compiler-backed coverage remain incomplete.
Separate sampler parameters are accepted and texture calls lower to Mojo placeholder helpers; sampler-state behavior is compile-smoke only.

Covers std140/std430 fixed-only blocks and mixed metadata plus final runtime-array blocks via ByteAddressBuffer, including bool/int/uint/float scalars, vectors, matrices, nested struct leaf fields, struct arrays, layout-distinct aggregate helpers, readonly aggregate helpers, nested aggregate leaf compound stores, aggregate struct load/store with fixed array fields, fixed arrays, int/uint scalar and runtime-array atomics, global-constant fixed sizes, readonly SRV lowering, block arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported layouts/types.

Covers std140/std430 fixed-only blocks and mixed metadata plus final runtime-array blocks via explicit pointer/offset lowering, including bool/int/uint/float scalars, vectors, matrices, nested struct leaf fields, struct arrays, layout-distinct aggregate helpers, readonly aggregate helpers, nested aggregate leaf compound stores, aggregate struct load/store with fixed array fields, fixed arrays, int/uint scalar and runtime-array atomics, global-constant fixed sizes, readonly const-device lowering, block arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported layouts/types.

GLSL-style layout(...) buffer blocks, explicit @glsl_buffer_block declarations, and buffer-qualified runtime-array declarations lower to SPIR-V BufferBlock Uniform descriptors with descriptor set/binding decorations, std430/std140/scalar member offsets and array/matrix strides for scalar/vector/matrix/fixed-array/runtime-array members, direct block member access, fixed block descriptor arrays across layouts, runtime block descriptor arrays with RuntimeDescriptorArray/SPV_EXT_descriptor_indexing, single-member descriptor arrays, inlined helper parameters, buffer_load/buffer_store helper lowering, layout-compatible fixed aggregate load/store/return conversion, runtime-array element aggregate copy, readonly/writeonly/coherent/volatile/restrict member decorations with direct/helper diagnostics, deterministic diagnostics for invalid whole runtime-array aggregate values, scalar int/uint member and runtime-array atomics, and spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

GLSL layout(...) buffer blocks, direct buffer array declarations, and explicit @glsl_buffer_block variables emit compile-safe Mojo value placeholders with resource metadata comments for layout, set/binding, and access. Fixed-array member access compile-smokes, readonly assignment diagnostics, and buffer-namespace binding collision diagnostics are covered; std140/std430 layout conversion, runtime-array storage semantics, atomics, and native GPU buffer ABI remain incomplete.

Storage-image, structured-buffer, and byte-address-buffer readonly/writeonly access metadata is tracked for Slang resources; invalid reads, writes, appends, and atomics emit deterministic diagnostics. Coherent/volatile/restrict-style resource qualifiers and compiler-backed validation are not fully audited yet.

Storage-image readonly/writeonly/coherent/volatile/restrict qualifiers lower to validated SPIR-V variable decorations with direct and interprocedural invalid read/write/atomic diagnostics; StructuredBuffer, RWStructuredBuffer, and GLSL buffer-block helper parameters inline to avoid invalid Uniform pointer calls while preserving read/write access diagnostics; GLSL buffer-block qualifiers lower to BufferBlock member decorations with direct/helper/atomic access diagnostics.

readonly/writeonly access metadata is preserved in resource metadata comments and validated for Mojo image, indexed image arrays, image-atomic, buffer, indexed buffer arrays, byte-address member calls, and GLSL buffer-block placeholder reads/writes; coherent/globallycoherent/volatile/restrict are preserved as metadata comments because Mojo has no target-native equivalent in this placeholder backend.

Basic sampled texture and shadow-sampler calls lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers across common dimensions, including HLSL sampled texture aliases, SamplerState aliases, and split-sampler member calls. Real sampler filtering and texture memory semantics are not implemented.

backlog.feature: Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations
backlog.notes: Covers explicit LOD, gradient, offset, combined LOD/gradient-offset, fragment bias operands, compute-stage bias diagnostics, and shadow compare LOD/gradient-offset forms. Non-bias forms have spirv-as/spirv-val coverage; projected forms are tracked separately.

backlog.feature: Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations
Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations
Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations
backlog.notes: LOD, gradient, and offset forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; target-valid coordinate and sampler-state semantics are not complete.

backlog.feature: Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations
Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations

backlog.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color and cube-shadow projection. Cube-array projection and target-invalid offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color projection and target-valid cube-shadow projection forms. Cube-array projection and target-invalid LOD/offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.
Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color and cube-shadow projection. Cube-array projection and target-invalid offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.
Projected texture forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; complete target projection semantics are not implemented.
Gather and gather-offset forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; component selection and target texture semantics are placeholder-only.
Shadow compare texture calls lower to Float32-returning Mojo placeholder helpers including LOD/offset/gather-compare variants; native depth-compare semantics remain incomplete.
Texture size, level, LOD-query, and multisample sample-count-style forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; target-invalid query validation is incomplete.

Covers textureSize, imageSize, textureQueryLevels, textureQueryLod, textureSamples, imageSamples, array/cube-array, shadow, multisample, formatted image, and user-symbol-collision helper forms using Slang GetDimensions/CalculateLevelOfDetail helpers. slangc-backed coverage and some target-invalid query diagnostics remain incomplete.
Texel fetch forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers for regular and multisample resources; detailed target-invalid fetch diagnostics are incomplete.

Covers 1D, 1D-array, 2D, 2D-array, and multisample texelFetch lowering to Slang Load or multisample subscript forms, plus explicit sampler fetches and resource-array fetch paths. Cube/cube-array and some target-invalid offset diagnostics remain incomplete.
Covers multisample texture fetches and sample-count/size queries for 2D and 2D-array resources with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage. Unsupported multisample compare/gather diagnostics are not complete.

Multisample texture fetch and query forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; advanced sampling/gather/compare forms on multisample textures emit deterministic diagnostics. Real multisample memory semantics remain incomplete.
Several unsupported combinations intentionally emit diagnostics.
Several unsupported combinations intentionally emit diagnostics.
Several unsupported combinations intentionally emit diagnostics.

Covers LOD, gradient, offset, projected sampling, fragment bias operands, gather, shadow compare, texel fetch, query, and multisample fetch/query forms. Most non-fragment-only forms have spirv-as/spirv-val coverage; sparse/min-lod style advanced operands remain untracked.

Advanced texture operations lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers across LOD, gradients, offsets, projection, gather, compare, and query families; image/non-texture targets, multisample targets for advanced sampling, and non-shadow compare targets emit deterministic diagnostics. Real target texture semantics are still placeholders.

Storage image load/store and size operations lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers for float, signed, unsigned, and multisample images; HLSL RWTexture and RasterizerOrderedTexture aliases plus member Load/Store/GetDimensions lower to those helpers. Access qualifiers and native image memory semantics are incomplete.

Covers RWTexture load/store for scalar, vector, explicit-format, array, formatted-image, and multisample storage images using Slang subscript access, plus typed helper generation and deterministic readonly/writeonly access diagnostics. Compiler-backed coverage remains incomplete.

Integer image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers, float-image atomics are rejected, and readonly/writeonly image atomics emit deterministic diagnostics. Native atomic memory semantics are not implemented.

Covers integer image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange across supported RWTexture dimensions through Slang Interlocked helper methods, direct AtomicOpNode lowering, expression-valued atomic preludes where evaluation order is preserved, loop-context diagnostics where hoisting would change semantics, image arrays, deterministic readonly/writeonly access diagnostics, and diagnostics for unsupported multisample/vector formats. Float atomics and compiler-backed coverage remain incomplete.
Multisample image load/store placeholders, arrays, and size/sample coordinates compile in Mojo; native multisample storage image semantics and validation are incomplete.
barrier/workgroupBarrier and memoryBarrier lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers, while user-defined functions with those names are preserved.
WaveOpNode calls are preserved as native HLSL Wave* intrinsics. Current tests cover pass-through for WaveActiveSum; broader Shader Model wave validation is still needed.
The frontend parses WaveOpNode and the OpenGL backend currently preserves the HLSL Wave* spelling, but native GLSL subgroup lowering and validator coverage are not implemented.
The Metal backend currently preserves WaveOpNode spellings rather than lowering to simdgroup intrinsics.

Lowers WaveGetLaneCount, WaveGetLaneIndex, WaveIsFirstLane, WaveActiveSum/Product/Min/Max/BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor, WavePrefixSum/Product, WaveActiveAllTrue/AnyTrue/Ballot, WaveReadLaneAt, WaveReadLaneFirst, QuadRead*, WaveMatch, and WaveMultiPrefix* to SPIR-V GroupNonUniform operations with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage where tools are available. Dynamic or out-of-range quad lanes and invalid multi-prefix masks emit deterministic diagnostics.
Mojo has no target-native subgroup ABI in this backend; WaveOpNode forms are rejected deterministically instead of stringifying unsupported IR.

Lowers WaveGetLaneCount, WaveGetLaneIndex, WaveIsFirstLane, WaveActiveSum/Product/Min/Max/BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor, WavePrefixSum/Product, WaveActiveAllTrue/AnyTrue/Ballot, WaveReadLaneAt, WaveReadLaneFirst, QuadRead*, WaveMatch, and WaveMultiPrefix* forms to native Slang/HLSL wave intrinsics with deterministic arity diagnostics. slangc-backed coverage is optional and skips when slangc is unavailable locally.

Lowers literal/wildcard condition chains, guarded literal arms, guarded identifier bindings, enum identifier patterns, final struct destructuring arms, and qualified non-generic payload enum destructuring patterns. Generic enum wrappers, unqualified constructor patterns, incompatible struct patterns, and range-style patterns remain diagnostic-only.

Mojo codegen validates unsupported payload enum shapes, payload constructor arity, parameter/return semantic, buffer access/member-method, image-atomic, and unsupported match pattern shapes with deterministic errors; broader stage/resource validation remains incomplete.

features.description: Emit target-language source or target representation from CrossGL.
features.name: CrossGL to target code generation

features.name: Native lexer coverage

features.description: Handle native preprocessor directives, includes, defines, and conditional compilation where the backend language exposes them.
features.name: Native preprocessor handling

cuda.notes: Plain 2D textureGather lowers to CUDA tex2Dgather with component selection and explicit-sampler overloads; native tex2Dgather imports back to CrossGL textureGather. Array, cube, offset, shadow, multisample, and sparse-residency gather forms emit deterministic diagnostics.

mojo.notes: Mojo source has no C-style preprocessor expansion in this frontend; # lines are treated as comments and native import/from-import declarations are parsed separately.

slang.notes: Storage-image readonly/writeonly access metadata is tracked for Slang RWTexture resources; invalid reads, writes, and image atomics emit deterministic diagnostics. Structured-buffer and byte-address-buffer access qualifiers are not audited yet.

vulkan.notes: Mesh/task IR operation nodes emit deterministic unsupported diagnostics with type-correct fallback values. Real SPIR-V mesh/task stage entry-point and payload lowering is not implemented yet.

features.description: CrossGL vertex entry point lowering.

cuda.notes: Graphics examples lower to CUDA-shaped code, not native raster pipeline stages.

hip.notes: Graphics examples lower to HIP-shaped code, not native raster pipeline stages.

mojo.notes: Vertex entry points lower to Mojo shader decorators and compile-oriented signatures, but Mojo has no complete raster pipeline/resource ABI in this repo.

mojo.notes: Fragment entry points lower to Mojo shader decorators and compile-oriented signatures, but direct render-target ABI semantics are not complete.

slang.notes: Compute entry points lower to Slang shader entries with HLSL-compatible numthreads defaults and parsed local-size layouts.

features.description: Geometry shader stage and primitive stream shape validation.

mojo.notes: Mojo codegen rejects geometry stages explicitly; the Mojo backend currently exposes only vertex, fragment, and compute compile-smoke stages.

slang.notes: Maps geometry blocks to Slang geometry entry points, lowers geometry system-value builtins, preserves semantic aliases, emits maxvertexcount attributes, and validates stage-attribute shapes. Full stream-output/emission semantics are still incomplete.

mojo.notes: Mojo codegen rejects tessellation stages explicitly; the Mojo backend currently exposes only vertex, fragment, and compute compile-smoke stages.

slang.notes: Maps tessellation_control and tessellation_evaluation to Slang hull/domain stages, lowers tessellation system values, tessellation-factor semantics, gl_in/gl_out patch rewrites, patch-constant functions, and validates hull/domain patch shapes and attributes. Full cross-stage compiler-backed tessellation coverage remains incomplete.

features.description: Modern mesh-style stage entry points.

directx.notes: Entry points lower to HLSL mesh/amplification shader attributes with deterministic stage names, numthreads from local-size layouts or @numthreads, and optional mesh output topology attributes. Full mesh payload/output signature validation remains incomplete.

metal.notes: Entry points lower to valid Metal object/mesh function attributes with deterministic names, max_total_threads_per_threadgroup from local-size layouts or explicit attributes, generated or explicit mesh output signatures/topology, SetMeshOutputCounts primitive counts, whole vertex/index/primitive output writes, single-member output member writes, multi-member partial output writes through accumulators, object/mesh payload parameters, DirectX-style @mesh_payload parameters, and DispatchMesh payload argument forwarding through object_data payloads. Literal output-count bounds, simple write-after-SetMeshOutputCounts ordering, if/switch branch dominance, and provable loop-exit dominance for post-branch/output writes are validated. Remaining gaps are symbolic loop iteration analysis and multi-payload pipeline shapes.

mojo.notes: Mojo codegen rejects mesh/task/object stages and mesh IR intrinsics explicitly; the Mojo backend currently exposes only vertex, fragment, and compute compile-smoke stages.

opengl.notes: Entry points and combined-stage names lower with GL_EXT_mesh_shader enablement and local-size layouts for task/mesh stages. Full mesh output layout and payload semantics are not complete.

slang.notes: Entry points lower to Slang mesh/amplification shader attributes with deterministic duplicate-entry names, local-size layouts or @numthreads attributes emit numthreads metadata, outputtopology emits quoted Slang attributes, and SetMeshOutputCounts/DispatchMesh lower to native Slang calls with arity and stage validation. Full mesh output signature/payload validation and slangc-backed mesh compilation remain incomplete.

features.description: Ray generation, hit, miss, callable, and intersection stages.
features.name: Ray tracing stages

directx.notes: Ray entry points lower to HLSL library shader attributes with stage-specific names and payload semantics, but full ray pipeline object/signature coverage remains incomplete.

metal.notes: Ray generation payloads lower to device references; acceleration structures and intersection_function_table resources lower to Metal raytracing buffer parameters; full TraceRay calls lower to ray plus intersector intersection queries with xcrun metal3 coverage for helper-threaded calls, instance masks, primitive_acceleration_structure shape, single compatible intersection_function_table dispatch, and thread-local payload forwarding. Unsupported TraceRay payload forms, such as missing compatible tables or non-thread payload parameters, emit compile-safe diagnostics. CallShader lowers to visible_function_table dispatch for explicit tables or a single global table; visible_function_table and intersection_function_table ray-generation parameters lower with compiler-validated buffer bindings; hit, miss, and callable stages lower to visible functions with ray_data payload/callable-data references; intersection stages lower to Metal intersection attributes for triangle and bounding-box functions. Arrayed Metal ray function table globals and parameters are emitted as compile-safe unsupported diagnostics because Metal rejects arrays of visible_function_table and intersection_function_table buffer parameters. Full Metal ray-pipeline binding and multi-table callable selection semantics remain incomplete.

mojo.notes: Mojo codegen rejects ray tracing stages, ray tracing intrinsics, and ray query methods explicitly; no Mojo ray pipeline ABI is implemented in this repo.

opengl.notes: Entry points and combined-stage names lower with GL_EXT_ray_tracing enablement, but full GLSL ray tracing layout and payload semantics are not complete.

slang.notes: Ray entry points lower to Slang shader stage attributes with deterministic stage names, ray built-ins lower to Slang intrinsics, payload, hit attribute, and callable data stage interfaces lower to Slang parameter directions, native TraceRay, CallShader, ReportHit, IgnoreHit, and AcceptHitAndEndSearch calls are stage/shape/type validated, and RayQuery methods emit native Slang calls with receiver/argument validation and result type inference. Full ray pipeline object/resource binding and slangc-backed coverage remain incomplete.

vulkan.notes: Registers RayQuery types and acceleration-structure resources as SPIR-V KHR objects; lowers TraceRayInline, Proceed, CandidateRayT, CommittedRayT, abort/terminate, generated/procedural intersection commits, non-opaque/confirm intersection commits, ray state getters for RayTMin and RayFlags, world ray vector getters, candidate/committed object ray vector getters, object/world transform matrix getters, candidate AABB opacity, and intersection metadata getters for type, primitive index, instance ID, instance custom index, shader-binding-table record offset, geometry index, barycentrics, and triangle front-face to KHR ray-query instructions with validator-backed coverage. Full ray tracing stages, TraceRay, acceleration-structure arrays, and triangle vertex positions remain incomplete.

features.description: Input parameter semantics and target builtin attributes.
features.name: Stage parameter semantics

mojo.notes: Stage parameter semantics are preserved as Mojo field/parameter comments for compile-smoke output, with duplicate parameter semantics, output-only input misuse, builtin stage misuse, and builtin parameter type mismatches rejected deterministically. Target-native builtin ABI mapping remains incomplete.

vulkan.notes: Global sampled textures, samplers, storage images, resource arrays, and cbuffers share deterministic DescriptorSet/Binding assignment with explicit @set/@group/@binding handling and duplicate binding rejection.

features.description: Function return semantics, wrapper output structs, and invalid-return validation.
features.name: Direct function return semantics

mojo.notes: Direct staged function return semantics are preserved as deterministic Mojo metadata comments, and builtin return semantics validate stage and type compatibility. Real target-native wrapper/ABI behavior remains incomplete.

slang.notes: Direct return semantics map to Slang system values, fragment color/depth returns can be rewritten through output structs, invalid void-return semantics are rejected, and stage/execution marker metadata is filtered so it does not become a return semantic. Full target ABI and slangc-backed return-semantics coverage remain incomplete.

features.description: Input/output struct member semantics and builtin type validation.
features.name: Struct member semantics

mojo.notes: Struct member semantics are preserved as Mojo field comments, builtin output semantic types are validated, and struct-return builtin semantics validate stage compatibility. Target-native shader I/O ABI lowering remains incomplete.

features.description: Resource binding/register/location assignment and collision avoidance.
features.name: Explicit and automatic resource bindings

mojo.notes: Global texture, sampler, image, structured-buffer/resource-array, and cbuffer declarations emit deterministic CrossGL resource metadata comments with explicit @set/@group/@binding and HLSL register-space preservation, automatic per-namespace binding assignment, and duplicate/range-overlap diagnostics. Mojo still uses compile-smoke placeholders rather than a native GPU resource ABI.

slang.notes: Global resources and cbuffers receive deterministic automatic [[vk::binding(binding, set)]] and HLSL register(space) decorations, explicit @set/@group/@space/@binding and register metadata is preserved on globals, cbuffers, arrays, acceleration structures, storage images, samplers, sampled textures, and resource parameters, fixed resource arrays reserve binding ranges, and conflicting binding/register, set/space, duplicate, and range-overlap metadata raises deterministic diagnostics.

vulkan.notes: Global sampled textures, samplers, storage images, resource arrays, and cbuffers share deterministic DescriptorSet/Binding assignment with explicit @set/@group/@binding handling and duplicate binding rejection.

features.description: CrossGL cbuffer/uniform block lowering.
features.name: Constant/uniform buffers

mojo.notes: CrossGL cbuffers lower to registered Mojo value structs with scalar/vector/matrix/array member storage, deterministic resource metadata comments, and compile-smoke coverage for local values, function parameters, and returns. Target-native uniform binding ABI is not complete.

vulkan.notes: CrossGL cbuffers lower to SPIR-V Uniform blocks with Block, member Offset, matrix stride, array stride, descriptor set/binding decorations, bare/member access lowering, duplicate binding rejection, and spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

features.description: StructuredBuffer, RWStructuredBuffer, SSBO-style storage, and access helpers.
features.name: Structured/storage buffers

directx.notes: Covers StructuredBuffer/RWStructuredBuffer declarations, fixed and inferred resource arrays, load/store/dimensions helpers, ByteAddressBuffer scalar/vector load/store helpers, byte-address vector helper resource/value shape diagnostics, native HLSL ByteAddressBuffer/RWByteAddressBuffer vector method import, register-space allocation, type aliases, append/consume buffers, access-mode diagnostics for readonly/append/consume misuse, rasterizer-ordered typed/structured buffers, and GLSL SSBO single-array round-trips.

metal.notes: Covers StructuredBuffer/RWStructuredBuffer as device pointers, fixed and inferred resource arrays, load/store helpers, buffer_dimensions through generated sidecar length buffers, and AppendStructuredBuffer/ConsumeStructuredBuffer through generated sidecar atomic counter buffers.

mojo.notes: StructuredBuffer, RWStructuredBuffer, typed Buffer/RWBuffer aliases, rasterizer-ordered structured/typed/byte-address buffer aliases, append/consume buffers, and byte-address buffers lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder abstractions with load/store/dimensions helpers and deterministic invalid member/free-helper diagnostics; real GPU memory binding semantics remain incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers StructuredBuffer/RWStructuredBuffer as SSBOs, fixed and inferred resource arrays, load/store/dimensions helpers, and AppendStructuredBuffer/ConsumeStructuredBuffer lowering through generated sidecar counter SSBOs.

slang.notes: Covers StructuredBuffer/RWStructuredBuffer declarations, AppendStructuredBuffer/ConsumeStructuredBuffer native method lowering, ByteAddressBuffer/RWByteAddressBuffer scalar and vector method lowering, fixed resource arrays, explicit and automatic Slang/Vulkan binding metadata, load/store/dimensions helper lowering, expression-form dimensions helpers, explicit-result and expression-valued structured-buffer atomics, loop-context diagnostics for value-preserving atomic hoists, access-kind diagnostics, and Slang vector alias mapping inside buffer element types. GLSL buffer-block round-trips are not implemented yet.

vulkan.notes: StructuredBuffer and RWStructuredBuffer globals lower to Vulkan-compatible SPIR-V BufferBlock descriptors with runtime-array storage, descriptor set/binding allocation, std430-style member/array layout decorations, buffer_load/buffer_store lowering, direct indexed member access, read-only store diagnostics, and spirv-as/spirv-val coverage. Append/consume and byte-address buffer operations are not implemented yet.

features.description: Fixed and unsized texture, sampler, image, and buffer arrays.
features.name: Resource arrays

directx.notes: Covers fixed, expression-sized, and inferred unsized texture/sampler arrays, shadow arrays, formatted image arrays, multisample image arrays, and StructuredBuffer/ByteAddressBuffer resource arrays with deterministic size-conflict diagnostics.

metal.notes: Covers fixed, expression-sized, and inferred unsized texture/sampler arrays, shadow arrays, formatted image arrays, multisample image arrays, and Metal buffer resource arrays with deterministic size-conflict diagnostics.

mojo.notes: Fixed resource arrays lower to InlineArray placeholders for textures, images, and buffers, and indexed image/buffer access honors readonly/writeonly validation. Unsized/resource-binding semantics are not complete.

opengl.notes: Covers fixed, expression-sized, and inferred unsized texture arrays, shadow arrays, formatted image arrays, multisample image arrays, and SSBO resource arrays with deterministic size-conflict diagnostics.

slang.notes: Covers fixed and expression-sized texture, sampler, shadow, image, StructuredBuffer, Append/ConsumeStructuredBuffer, and ByteAddressBuffer arrays, nested resource arrays, dynamic resource-array parameters, indexed access through control flow and loops, automatic binding range allocation, and overlap diagnostics. Unsized/bindless resource-array semantics and compiler-backed coverage remain incomplete.

features.description: Represent combined and separate texture/sampler models without binding collisions.
features.name: Texture and sampler object model

directx.notes: Covers separate texture and sampler declarations, implicit sampler threading, comparison sampler role separation, arrayed samplers, register-space inheritance, and collision-free binding namespaces.

metal.notes: Covers separate texture and sampler declarations, implicit sampler threading, comparison sampler role separation, arrayed samplers, and collision-free texture/sampler/buffer binding namespaces.

mojo.notes: Separate sampler parameters are accepted and texture calls lower to Mojo placeholder helpers; sampler-state behavior is compile-smoke only.

opengl.notes: Covers combined sampler emission, source sampler elision, shadow-compare coordinate construction, sampler/image binding independence, arrayed sampler filtering, and collision-free binding namespaces.

features.description: Lower GLSL-style buffer blocks and preserve deterministic diagnostics for unsupported target shapes.
features.name: GLSL buffer block lowering

directx.notes: Covers std140/std430 fixed-only blocks and mixed metadata plus final runtime-array blocks via ByteAddressBuffer, including bool/int/uint/float scalars, vectors, matrices, nested struct leaf fields, struct arrays, layout-distinct aggregate helpers, readonly aggregate helpers, nested aggregate leaf compound stores, aggregate struct load/store with fixed array fields, fixed arrays, int/uint scalar and runtime-array atomics, global-constant fixed sizes, readonly SRV lowering, block arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported layouts/types.

metal.notes: Covers std140/std430 fixed-only blocks and mixed metadata plus final runtime-array blocks via explicit pointer/offset lowering, including bool/int/uint/float scalars, vectors, matrices, nested struct leaf fields, struct arrays, layout-distinct aggregate helpers, readonly aggregate helpers, nested aggregate leaf compound stores, aggregate struct load/store with fixed array fields, fixed arrays, int/uint scalar and runtime-array atomics, global-constant fixed sizes, readonly const-device lowering, block arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported layouts/types.

mojo.notes: GLSL layout(...) buffer blocks, direct buffer array declarations, and explicit @glsl_buffer_block variables emit compile-safe Mojo value placeholders with resource metadata comments for layout, set/binding, and access. Fixed-array member access compile-smokes, readonly assignment diagnostics, and buffer-namespace binding collision diagnostics are covered; std140/std430 layout conversion, runtime-array storage semantics, atomics, and native GPU buffer ABI remain incomplete.

slang.notes: Storage-image, structured-buffer, and byte-address-buffer readonly/writeonly access metadata is tracked for Slang resources; invalid reads, writes, appends, and atomics emit deterministic diagnostics. Coherent/volatile/restrict-style resource qualifiers and compiler-backed validation are not fully audited yet.

vulkan.notes: GLSL-style layout(...) buffer blocks, explicit @glsl_buffer_block declarations, and buffer-qualified runtime-array declarations lower to SPIR-V BufferBlock Uniform descriptors with descriptor set/binding decorations, std430/std140/scalar member offsets and array/matrix strides for scalar/vector/matrix/fixed-array/runtime-array members, direct block member access, fixed block descriptor arrays across layouts, runtime block descriptor arrays with RuntimeDescriptorArray/SPV_EXT_descriptor_indexing, single-member descriptor arrays, inlined helper parameters, buffer_load/buffer_store helper lowering, layout-compatible fixed aggregate load/store/return conversion, runtime-array element aggregate copy, readonly/writeonly/coherent/volatile/restrict member decorations with direct/helper diagnostics, deterministic diagnostics for invalid whole runtime-array aggregate values, scalar int/uint member and runtime-array atomics, and spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

features.description: Translate readonly/writeonly/coherent/volatile/restrict-style resource qualifiers where the target has an equivalent.
features.name: Resource memory qualifiers

directx.notes: coherent/globallycoherent lower to HLSL globallycoherent; readonly/writeonly enforce storage-image access validation; qualifiers without an HLSL resource equivalent do not leak as semantics.

metal.notes: readonly/writeonly lower to Metal texture access modes; qualifiers without a Metal texture equivalent do not leak as attributes.

mojo.notes: readonly/writeonly access metadata is preserved in resource metadata comments and validated for Mojo image, indexed image arrays, image-atomic, buffer, indexed buffer arrays, byte-address member calls, and GLSL buffer-block placeholder reads/writes; coherent/globallycoherent/volatile/restrict are preserved as metadata comments because Mojo has no target-native equivalent in this placeholder backend.

opengl.notes: GLSL-native resource qualifiers are preserved on globals and helper parameters; globallycoherent lowers to the closest GLSL coherent qualifier.

vulkan.notes: Storage-image readonly/writeonly/coherent/volatile/restrict qualifiers lower to validated SPIR-V variable decorations with direct and interprocedural invalid read/write/atomic diagnostics; StructuredBuffer, RWStructuredBuffer, and GLSL buffer-block helper parameters inline to avoid invalid Uniform pointer calls while preserving read/write access diagnostics; GLSL buffer-block qualifiers lower to BufferBlock member decorations with direct/helper/atomic access diagnostics.

features.description: Basic sampling with regular and shadow samplers.
features.name: Texture sampling

mojo.notes: Basic sampled texture and shadow-sampler calls lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers across common dimensions, including HLSL sampled texture aliases, SamplerState aliases, and split-sampler member calls. Real sampler filtering and texture memory semantics are not implemented.

features.description: Lower explicit LOD, gradient, bias, and offset texture operations.
features.name: Texture LOD, gradient, and offset operations

directx.notes: Covers explicit LOD, gradient, bias, 2D/array offsets, cube/cube-array gradients, 3D offsets, resource arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid offset forms.

metal.notes: Covers target-valid explicit LOD, gradient, bias, 2D/array offsets, cube/cube-array gradients, 3D offsets, resource arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid offset, 1D LOD/query, and 1D bias/gradient forms.

mojo.notes: LOD, gradient, and offset forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; target-valid coordinate and sampler-state semantics are not complete.

opengl.notes: Covers explicit LOD, gradient, bias, 2D/array offsets, cube/cube-array gradients, 3D offsets, resource arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid offset forms.

vulkan.notes: Covers explicit LOD, gradient, offset, combined LOD/gradient-offset, fragment bias operands, compute-stage bias diagnostics, and shadow compare LOD/gradient-offset forms. Non-bias forms have spirv-as/spirv-val coverage; projected forms are tracked separately.

features.description: Lower projection-coordinate texture sampling and shadow comparison variants.
features.name: Projected texture operations

directx.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color and cube-shadow projection. Cube-array projection and target-invalid offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

metal.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color and cube-shadow projection. Cube-array projection and target-invalid offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

mojo.notes: Projected texture forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; complete target projection semantics are not implemented.

opengl.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color projection and target-valid cube-shadow projection forms. Cube-array projection and target-invalid LOD/offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

vulkan.notes: Covers projected color sampling for 2D, 2D-array, 3D, and cube textures plus projected 2D, 2D-array, and cube shadow comparisons across offset, LOD, gradient, and fragment bias variants. Non-bias projected forms have spirv-as/spirv-val coverage; cube-array projection is rejected deterministically.

features.description: Lower gather, gather-offset, and gather-offsets texture operations.
features.name: Texture gather operations

directx.notes: Covers gather, gather-offset, gather-offsets, dynamic component selection, resource arrays, cube/cube-array gather, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported dimensions and offset forms.

metal.notes: Covers gather, gather-offset, gather-offsets, dynamic component selection, resource arrays, cube/cube-array gather, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported dimensions and offset forms.

mojo.notes: Gather and gather-offset forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; component selection and target texture semantics are placeholder-only.

opengl.notes: Covers gather, gather-offset, gather-offsets, dynamic component selection, resource arrays, cube/cube-array gather, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported dimensions and offset forms.

vulkan.notes: Covers gather, gather-offset, gather-offsets, dynamic component selection, resource arrays, and shadow gather-compare forms with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

features.description: Lower shadow sampler compare operations, including offset and LOD variants where target semantics allow them.
features.name: Shadow compare texture operations

directx.notes: Covers comparison samplers, shadow resource arrays, compare offsets, gather-compare, LOD/gradient compare variants where HLSL permits them, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid combinations.

metal.notes: Covers depth textures, shadow resource arrays, compare offsets, gather-compare, LOD/gradient compare variants where Metal permits them, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid combinations.

mojo.notes: Shadow compare texture calls lower to Float32-returning Mojo placeholder helpers including LOD/offset/gather-compare variants; native depth-compare semantics remain incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers shadow samplers, shadow resource arrays, compare offsets, gather-compare, LOD/gradient compare variants where GLSL permits them, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid combinations.

vulkan.notes: Covers shadow comparison sampling, LOD/gradient/offset variants, gather-compare, resource arrays, and explicit sampler arguments with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

features.description: Lower size, LOD, levels, and sample-count resource query operations, with deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.
features.name: Texture query operations

directx.notes: Covers sampler queries, storage-image size queries, multisample level/sample queries, array/cube-array LOD coordinates, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.

metal.notes: Covers sampler queries, storage-image size queries, multisample level/sample queries, array/cube-array LOD coordinates, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.

mojo.notes: Texture size, level, LOD-query, and multisample sample-count-style forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; target-invalid query validation is incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers sampler queries, storage-image size queries, multisample level/sample queries, array/cube-array LOD coordinates, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.

slang.notes: Covers textureSize, imageSize, textureQueryLevels, textureQueryLod, textureSamples, imageSamples, array/cube-array, shadow, multisample, formatted image, and user-symbol-collision helper forms using Slang GetDimensions/CalculateLevelOfDetail helpers. slangc-backed coverage and some target-invalid query diagnostics remain incomplete.

vulkan.notes: Covers textureSize, imageSize, textureQueryLevels, textureQueryLod, textureSamples, imageSamples, array/cube-array coordinate trimming, and multisample query forms with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

features.description: Lower integer-coordinate texel fetch and fetch-offset operations, with deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid fetch forms.
features.name: Texel fetch operations

directx.notes: Covers regular 2D/array fetch and offset lowering plus deterministic diagnostics for storage-image, multisample-offset, and cube/cube-array target-invalid fetch forms.

metal.notes: Covers regular 2D/array fetch and offset lowering plus deterministic diagnostics for storage-image, multisample-offset, and cube/cube-array target-invalid fetch forms.

mojo.notes: Texel fetch forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers for regular and multisample resources; detailed target-invalid fetch diagnostics are incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers regular 2D/array fetch and offset lowering plus deterministic diagnostics for storage-image, multisample-offset, and cube/cube-array target-invalid fetch forms.

slang.notes: Covers 1D, 1D-array, 2D, 2D-array, and multisample texelFetch lowering to Slang Load or multisample subscript forms, plus explicit sampler fetches and resource-array fetch paths. Cube/cube-array and some target-invalid offset diagnostics remain incomplete.

vulkan.notes: Covers regular, array, fetch-offset, and multisample texelFetch lowering to OpImageFetch with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage, plus deterministic diagnostics for multisample fetch-offset and cube/cube-array target-invalid forms.

features.description: Lower multisample texture fetch, query, and comparison forms with deterministic diagnostics for unsupported combinations.
features.name: Multisample texture operations

directx.notes: Covers 2D and 2D-array multisample fetches, sample-count and level queries, resource arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported sample, offset, LOD, compare, and gather combinations.

metal.notes: Covers 2D and 2D-array multisample fetches, sample-count and level queries, resource arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported sample, offset, LOD, compare, and gather combinations.

mojo.notes: Multisample texture fetch and query forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers; advanced sampling/gather/compare forms on multisample textures emit deterministic diagnostics. Real multisample memory semantics remain incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers 2D and 2D-array multisample fetches, sample-count and level queries, resource arrays, and deterministic diagnostics for unsupported sample, offset, LOD, compare, and gather combinations.

vulkan.notes: Covers multisample texture fetches and sample-count/size queries for 2D and 2D-array resources with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage. Unsupported multisample compare/gather diagnostics are not complete.

features.description: LOD, gradients, offsets, projected coordinates, gathers, compares, and resource queries.
features.name: Advanced texture operations

directx.notes: Several unsupported combinations intentionally emit diagnostics.

metal.notes: Several unsupported combinations intentionally emit diagnostics.

mojo.notes: Advanced texture operations lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers across LOD, gradients, offsets, projection, gather, compare, and query families; image/non-texture targets, multisample targets for advanced sampling, and non-shadow compare targets emit deterministic diagnostics. Real target texture semantics are still placeholders.

opengl.notes: Several unsupported combinations intentionally emit diagnostics.

vulkan.notes: Covers LOD, gradient, offset, projected sampling, fragment bias operands, gather, shadow compare, texel fetch, query, and multisample fetch/query forms. Most non-fragment-only forms have spirv-as/spirv-val coverage; sparse/min-lod style advanced operands remain untracked.

features.description: Readable and writable image resources with explicit formats and access qualifiers.
features.name: Storage image load/store

directx.notes: Covers typed RWTexture load/store for scalar, vector, narrow, explicit-format, array, access-qualified, and rasterizer-ordered images, with deterministic diagnostics for incompatible access.

metal.notes: Covers texture read/write for scalar, vector, narrow, explicit-format, array, and access-qualified images, with deterministic diagnostics for incompatible access.

mojo.notes: Storage image load/store and size operations lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers for float, signed, unsigned, and multisample images; HLSL RWTexture and RasterizerOrderedTexture aliases plus member Load/Store/GetDimensions lower to those helpers. Access qualifiers and native image memory semantics are incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers image load/store for scalar, vector, narrow, explicit-format, array, and access-qualified images, with deterministic diagnostics for incompatible access.

slang.notes: Covers RWTexture load/store for scalar, vector, explicit-format, array, formatted-image, and multisample storage images using Slang subscript access, plus typed helper generation and deterministic readonly/writeonly access diagnostics. Compiler-backed coverage remains incomplete.

vulkan.notes: Covers OpImageRead/OpImageWrite for scalar, vector, explicit-format, array, and multisample storage images, with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage for resource-heavy compute shaders.

features.description: Atomic operations on image resources.
features.name: Image atomics

directx.notes: Covers integer image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange across supported dimensions, including rasterizer-ordered textures, and emits deterministic diagnostics for unsupported formats and multisample atomics.

metal.notes: Covers integer texture atomics add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange across supported dimensions and emits deterministic diagnostics for unsupported formats and multisample atomics.

mojo.notes: Integer image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange forms lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers, float-image atomics are rejected, and readonly/writeonly image atomics emit deterministic diagnostics. Native atomic memory semantics are not implemented.

opengl.notes: Covers integer image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange across supported dimensions and emits deterministic diagnostics for unsupported formats and argument shapes.

slang.notes: Covers integer image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange across supported RWTexture dimensions through Slang Interlocked helper methods, direct AtomicOpNode lowering, expression-valued atomic preludes where evaluation order is preserved, loop-context diagnostics where hoisting would change semantics, image arrays, deterministic readonly/writeonly access diagnostics, and diagnostics for unsupported multisample/vector formats. Float atomics and compiler-backed coverage remain incomplete.

vulkan.notes: Covers integer storage-image atomic add/min/max/bitwise/exchange/compare-exchange through OpImageTexelPointer and OpAtomic instructions, with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage.

features.description: Represent multisample storage images and report unsupported load/store/atomic combinations deterministically.
features.name: Multisample storage images

directx.notes: Represents multisample storage images as read-capable SRVs, preserves size/sample queries and arrays, and emits deterministic diagnostics for DirectX-unsupported stores and atomics.

metal.notes: Represents multisample storage images as read-capable textures, preserves size/sample queries and arrays, and emits deterministic diagnostics for Metal-unsupported stores and atomics.

mojo.notes: Multisample image load/store placeholders, arrays, and size/sample coordinates compile in Mojo; native multisample storage image semantics and validation are incomplete.

opengl.notes: Covers multisample image load/store, sample-count and size queries, arrays, typed formats, and integer atomics where GLSL permits them.

features.description: Lower struct declarations, member access, initialization, and return values.
features.name: Struct declarations and construction

features.description: Lower fixed arrays, array parameters, indexing, and array return diagnostics.
features.name: Array declarations and access

features.description: Lower helper functions, entry functions, call expressions, and return statements.
features.name: Function declarations and calls

features.description: if/else, loops, switch, break, continue, and return statements.
features.name: Control flow

features.description: Lower barrier, memoryBarrier, and workgroupBarrier calls to backend-native synchronization intrinsics.
features.name: Synchronization and memory barriers

cuda.notes: Native CUDA barrier and cooperative-groups thread-block sync forms round-trip to CrossGL workgroup barriers, with unsupported non-workgroup cooperative scopes, cooperative-groups async copy/wait calls, CUDA barrier/pipeline async-copy helper calls, and CUDA primitive pipeline intrinsics emitted as expression-safe diagnostics.

directx.notes: barrier/workgroupBarrier lower to GroupMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync; memoryBarrier lowers to AllMemoryBarrier; user-defined functions with the same names are preserved.

metal.notes: barrier/workgroupBarrier, groupMemoryBarrier, and memoryBarrierShared lower to threadgroup barriers; memoryBarrier, memoryBarrierBuffer, and deviceMemoryBarrier lower to device-memory barriers; memoryBarrierImage lowers to a texture-memory barrier; allMemoryBarrier lowers to combined device/threadgroup/texture flags; threadgroup atomic arrays and GLSL buffer-block atomic compare helpers use address-form atomic operations across helper/kernel barrier ordering; atomic compare-exchange lowers target and expected-value address forms to toolchain-compatible Metal intrinsics, with deterministic diagnostics for unsupported expected-pointer address spaces; user-defined functions with the same names are preserved.

mojo.notes: barrier/workgroupBarrier and memoryBarrier lower to compile-smoke Mojo placeholder helpers, while user-defined functions with those names are preserved.

opengl.notes: workgroupBarrier lowers to GLSL barrier; barrier and memoryBarrier remain native; user-defined workgroupBarrier functions are preserved.

vulkan.notes: barrier/workgroupBarrier lower to OpControlBarrier; groupMemoryBarrier and memoryBarrierShared lower to workgroup-scoped OpMemoryBarrier, memoryBarrierBuffer and memoryBarrierImage lower to device-scoped buffer/image memory barriers, memoryBarrier/allMemoryBarrier lower to device-scoped all-memory barriers, user-defined functions with synchronization names are preserved, and spirv-as/spirv-val coverage exists.

features.description: Lower CrossGL Wave* subgroup operations including lane queries, reductions, scans, votes, ballots, and lane reads.
features.name: Wave/subgroup intrinsics

directx.notes: WaveOpNode calls are preserved as native HLSL Wave* intrinsics. Current tests cover pass-through for WaveActiveSum; broader Shader Model wave validation is still needed.

metal.notes: The Metal backend currently preserves WaveOpNode spellings rather than lowering to simdgroup intrinsics.

mojo.notes: Mojo has no target-native subgroup ABI in this backend; WaveOpNode forms are rejected deterministically instead of stringifying unsupported IR.

opengl.notes: The frontend parses WaveOpNode and the OpenGL backend currently preserves the HLSL Wave* spelling, but native GLSL subgroup lowering and validator coverage are not implemented.

slang.notes: Lowers WaveGetLaneCount, WaveGetLaneIndex, WaveIsFirstLane, WaveActiveSum/Product/Min/Max/BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor, WavePrefixSum/Product, WaveActiveAllTrue/AnyTrue/Ballot, WaveReadLaneAt, WaveReadLaneFirst, QuadRead*, WaveMatch, and WaveMultiPrefix* forms to native Slang/HLSL wave intrinsics with deterministic arity diagnostics. slangc-backed coverage is optional and skips when slangc is unavailable locally.

vulkan.notes: Lowers WaveGetLaneCount, WaveGetLaneIndex, WaveIsFirstLane, WaveActiveSum/Product/Min/Max/BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor, WavePrefixSum/Product, WaveActiveAllTrue/AnyTrue/Ballot, WaveReadLaneAt, WaveReadLaneFirst, QuadRead*, WaveMatch, and WaveMultiPrefix* to SPIR-V GroupNonUniform operations with spirv-as/spirv-val coverage where tools are available. Dynamic or out-of-range quad lanes and invalid multi-prefix masks emit deterministic diagnostics.

features.description: CrossGL match expressions and pattern arms.
features.name: Match/pattern lowering

directx.notes: Covers switch-lowerable literal/wildcard arms, guarded if-chain arms, identifier bindings, struct fields, enum path and payload patterns, generic enum matches, match expressions, scoped case bodies, and shader validation with texture/image resources.

metal.notes: Covers switch-lowerable literal/wildcard arms, guarded if-chain arms, identifier bindings, struct fields, enum path and payload patterns, generic enum matches, match expressions, scoped case bodies, and shader validation with texture/image resources.

mojo.notes: Lowers literal/wildcard condition chains, guarded literal arms, guarded identifier bindings, enum identifier patterns, final struct destructuring arms, and qualified non-generic payload enum destructuring patterns. Generic enum wrappers, unqualified constructor patterns, incompatible struct patterns, and range-style patterns remain diagnostic-only.

opengl.notes: Covers switch-lowerable literal/wildcard arms, guarded if-chain arms, identifier bindings, struct fields, enum path and payload patterns, generic enum matches, match expressions, scoped case bodies, and shader validation with texture/image resources.

rust.notes: Rust lowering covers literal/wildcard arms, guarded arms, identifier bindings, struct fields, enum path and payload patterns, generic enum matches, struct-like enum variants, target-typed struct-like generic enum constructor inference, match expressions, scoped case bodies, and non-Copy generic enum payload move/clone planning.

features.description: Vector/matrix constructors, arithmetic, swizzles, casts, and helper intrinsics.
features.name: Vector and matrix expressions

features.description: Integer bitwise operators and assignment variants.
features.name: Bitwise operations

features.description: Backend-specific validation for invalid semantics, stages, resource shapes, and builtin types.
features.name: Invalid shader shape validation

mojo.notes: Mojo codegen validates unsupported payload enum shapes, payload constructor arity, parameter/return semantic, buffer access/member-method, image-atomic, and unsupported match pattern shapes with deterministic errors; broader stage/resource validation remains incomplete.

status_descriptions.diagnostic: The backend emits a deterministic diagnostic or fallback instead of full target code.
status_descriptions.partial: Implemented for common cases, but known target features or edge cases are missing.
status_descriptions.supported: Implemented with positive tests for the repo-owned CrossGL contract.
status_descriptions.unknown: Not audited yet. Do not treat this as supported.
status_descriptions.unsupported: The backend intentionally does not support this capability yet.
status_descriptions.validated_rejection: The backend rejects this shape with an explicit validation error.
